info.name: REST API Boilerplate
info.description: A Postman collection for testing the REST API Boilerplate endpoints. Set the base_url variable to your API URL before running requests.

request.description:
## Register

Creates a new user account by registering with an email address and password.

### Request Body

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `email` | string | Yes | The email address of the new user. |
| `password` | string | Yes | The password for the new account. |

### Example Request Body

``` json
{
    "email": "user@example.com",
    "password": "yourpassword"
}

 ```

### Responses

| Status | Description |
| --- | --- |
| `201` | User successfully registered. |
| `400` | Bad request — missing or invalid fields. |
| `409` | Conflict — a user with this email already exists. |

Authenticates a user and returns an access token.

## Request Body

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `email` | string | Yes | The registered email address of the user. |
| `password` | string | Yes | The user's password. |

## Example Request Body

``` json
{
    "email": "your@email.com",
    "password": "yourpassword"
}

 ```

## Responses

| Status | Description |
| --- | --- |
| `200 OK` | Login successful. Returns an access token. |
| `400 Bad Request` | Missing or invalid request body fields. |
| `401 Unauthorized` | Invalid email or password. |

## Refresh

Refreshes the current session by issuing a new access token using a valid refresh token.

Refreshes the access token using the refresh token stored in the httpOnly cookie. No request body needed — the cookie is sent automatically by the browser.

### Responses

| Status | Description |
| --- | --- |
| `200 OK` | Token successfully refreshed. Returns a new access token. |
| `400 Bad Request` | Missing or invalid request body fields. |
| `401 Unauthorized` | The refresh token is invalid or has expired. |

# Logout

Logs out the authenticated user by invalidating their current session/token. After a successful logout, the provided access token will no longer be valid for subsequent requests.

## Request

**Method & URL**

```
POST {{base_url}}/auth/logout

 ```

**Required Headers**

| Header | Value |
| --- | --- |
| `Authorization` | `Bearer {{access_token}}` |

## Response

**200 OK**

``` json
{
  "message": "Logged out successfully"
}

 ```

## Notes

- The `{{access_token}}` must be obtained from the **login** endpoint prior to calling this endpoint.
    
- Once logged out, the access token is invalidated and cannot be reused. You will need to log in again to obtain a new token.
